desc: In src/index.js, the query-string parser's assign helper never checks for a trailing `[]` on a key, so repeated bracket-array keys like a[]=1&a[]=2 just overwrite the same property instead of collecting into an array. Fix assign so keys ending in `[]` are detected, the suffix is stripped, and values are pushed into an array (initialized on first sight) so tests/qsarray.test.ts passes.
